task_description: DMS Cockpit v0.5 refinement: fix state/data consistency bugs, completely rebuild the RightHeadPanel with contour-line face mesh, and refine all other panels for production-grade quality.

verification.summary: Cannot run build/test - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network, no node_modules. Verified by code inspection: (1) integrationScore*100 bug eliminated (grep confirms zero matches), (2) all 5 cockpit components import from unified driverStateMapping utility, (3) no local state mapping functions remain in cockpit components, (4) RightHeadPanel uses contour-line approach with LAYER_*_PATHS (no FACE_MESH_TRIANGLES), (5) OUTPUT CONTRACT labels match exact format, (6) DecisionCard whyExplanation improved, (7) CenterVideoPanel has tighter bbox and face confidence label, (8) all imports appear type-correct per strict TS inspection.
